title: Gascoigne, Ben - Government Whip - ACOBA advice
body: "Lord Gascoigne left his role as a Government Whip in July 2024.  Non-Executive Director, Conservative Environment Network  Lord Gascoigne sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with the Conservative Environment Network. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in April 2025; and the appointment was announced in May 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
